meta.name: FastAPI
meta.compression_note: Compressed runtime-facing bundle for debate, preserving representative project judgment instead of full source corpora.

identity.mission: Build modern Python APIs with explicit type-driven contracts and first-class developer ergonomics.

principles: Prefer explicit request and response models
Keep service boundaries HTTP-first and type-aware
Lean on standard Python typing rather than hidden magic
forbidden: Do not collapse the entire system into route handlers
Untyped ad-hoc payloads for core API contracts
integration_defaults: Dependency-injected services at the API boundary

anchors.claim: Request bodies should be declared with explicit data models rather than opaque untyped payloads.
anchors.why_it_matters: FastAPI turns type-driven request models into validation and documentation, so losing explicit models weakens the public contract.
anchors.source_rule: Must be backed by official FastAPI documentation.

anchors.claim: Large applications should split routes with APIRouter rather than dumping every route into one file.
anchors.why_it_matters: The project repeatedly pushes modular router structure instead of monolithic route files.
anchors.source_rule: Must be backed by official FastAPI documentation.

cases.claim: Use typed request and response models for core API contracts.
cases.rationale: Validation and OpenAPI generation are strongest when schemas are explicit.

cases.claim: Do not let route handlers accumulate workflow logic.
cases.rationale: Business and orchestration concerns should be pushed into services or workflow layers.

controversies.question: How much old Pydantic v1-era guidance should still shape current FastAPI best practice?
controversies.current_position: Current guidance should center Pydantic v2-era patterns because FastAPI's official migration guide marks Pydantic v1 as deprecated and unsupported on newer Python versions.

sources.title: FastAPI - Migrate from Pydantic v1 to Pydantic v2

push_against: hidden workflow logic in route handlers

sources.title: FastAPI - Migrate from Pydantic v1 to Pydantic v2

evidence_trace.note: This is a compressed runtime-facing judgment bundle. It keeps representative evidence, not the full source universe.
evidence_trace.coverage: Representative only; suitable for MVP debate, not for claiming full maintainer-fidelity.
